name: shop-apothecary
summary: An apothecary's shop. A counter with scales and a mortar, wall after wall of labeled drawers, jars of dried herbs, a back workroom with an alembic bubbling. Smells of lavender and bitter roots.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with counter front, workroom back

accent.purpose: stained zone near the back workbench

primary_palette.note: classic apothecary — drawers, herbs, front scale
scholarly apothecary — books and cases of rare specimens

story_prompts: plague morning — line of customers, apothecary dispensing tinctures by the ladle
noble commission — private consultation, a silver coin on the counter, rare herbs requested
regulator visit — city official checking for restricted substances
brewing accident — back room smoking, apothecary coughing

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm amber light (0.4-0.45) — jars catch the light

anti_patterns: walls should be wall-to-ceiling drawers and shelves — no empty wall space
dangerous brewing stays in the back — customers don't stand next to an alembic
don't make it too clean — a working apothecary is crowded and fragrant
